gaps: AI training use not explicitly stated
label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Apple emphasizes privacy as core value with significant technical measures (on-device processing, encryption, minimal data sharing). Does not sell data or use for advertising. Honors DNT signals. Limited cross-site tracking and ad profiling compared to competitors. End-to-end encryption available for many services.
